mentions.note: CEO took accountability rather than blaming environment; Gap brand executing well but Old Navy seasonal weakness led to soft guidance. Low valuation at 9x earnings with solid dividend offsets turnaround slowdown.
Overall stabilizing but Athleta subsidiary weak link with sales down 12%, same-store sales down 11%. Gap rebuilding brand but this is long turnaround project; need visible progress before adding.
Q4: 3% Old Navy, 7% Gap, 4% Banana Republic; 8 consecutive quarters positive comps; highest margin in 25 yrs; beauty expansion, tariff headwinds offset; 10% selloff unjustified.
